name: codex-code-review-plugin
description: Generic Codex-oriented code review prompts and command wrappers for high-signal pull request and diff review.

interface.shortDescription: High-signal review prompts for diffs and pull requests.
interface.longDescription: A generic Codex workflow for collecting repository context, simulating independent reviewer passes, validating candidate findings, scoring confidence, and reporting only actionable issues introduced by the current change.
defaultPrompt: Review my current diff with high signal.
Review PR #123 and report only real issues.
Prepare a GitHub-ready code review comment.
